name: ActiveCampaign
description: Drive ActiveCampaign (marketing automation + CRM) from any AI agent: contacts, lists, tags, deals, pipelines, campaigns, automations. 16 tools. Custom Api-Token header auth, per-account API URL.
instructions:
This connector uses the ActiveCampaign API v3.

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to ActiveCampaign → **Settings → Developer**. Two values:
   - **URL** (your account's API URL): `https://{ACCOUNT}.api-us1.com` (or .api-eu1.com, etc.)
   - **Key**: a long alphanumeric API key.
2. Set `ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_URL` = the full URL from step 1 (no trailing slash, no `/api/3`).
3. Set `ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_KEY` = the key.

**Authentication**: custom header `Api-Token: ${ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_KEY}`.

**Account-scoped base URL**: every account has its own subdomain. The adapter substitutes `{{ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_URL}}/api/3` as the base. If you use OAuth2 instead of the API key, the URL is the same.

**Contact model**: every contact has `email` (primary key), plus optional firstName, lastName, phone. Custom fields are 'field values' — separate POSTs to `/fieldValues`. The adapter exposes both contact CRUD and field-value management.

**Lists are static, Tags are flexible**: lists need explicit subscribe operations and trigger double-opt-in by default. Tags are unlimited, free-form labels — easier for segmentation.

**Status values for contact-list memberships**: 1=Active, 2=Unsubscribed, 0=Pending double-opt-in confirmation. Pass these as integers in `contactList.status`.

**Deals are CRM-side**: separate from contacts (one deal links to one primary contact + one organization). Has stage_id (pipeline position), value, currency.

**Pagination**: most list endpoints support `limit` (max 100) + `offset`. `?include=...` side-loads related resources.

**Rate limits**: ~5 req/sec per account on Plus/Pro, higher on Enterprise. On 429, back off.

**Out of scope here**: campaign content composition (use UI), automation creation (UI-only), site tracking JS, deep CRM custom-object schemas, eCommerce integrations.

tools.name: activecampaign_list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts with optional filters. Each contact returns id, email, firstName, lastName, phone, cdate (created), udate (updated), fieldValues[].

listid.description: Filter to contacts on this list.

tagid.description: Filter to contacts with this tag.

tools.name: activecampaign_get_contact
tools.description: Fetch a contact by ID with relationships (contactLists, contactTags, fieldValues, etc.).

tools.name: activecampaign_sync_contact
tools.description: Upsert a contact by email (creates if missing, updates if exists). The preferred way to onboard contacts — avoids the 422 'duplicate' error of POST /contacts.

contact.description: {email, firstName?, lastName?, phone?, fieldValues?: [{field, value}]}. Wrap inside {contact: {...}}.

tools.name: activecampaign_update_contact
tools.description: Update an existing contact by ID. Use sync if you don't know whether the contact exists yet.

tools.name: activecampaign_delete_contact
tools.description: Permanently delete a contact (GDPR right-to-be-forgotten). Irreversible.

tools.name: activecampaign_subscribe_contact_to_list
tools.description: Add a contact to a list with the given status. status=1 = Active (skips double-opt-in), 2=Unsubscribed.

contactList.description: {list: LIST_ID, contact: CONTACT_ID, status: 1|2|0}. Wrap inside {contactList: {...}}.

tools.name: activecampaign_list_lists
tools.description: List all subscriber lists. Each returns id, name, subscriber_count, created.

tools.name: activecampaign_list_tags
tools.description: List tags. Each tag has id, tag (the name), tagType (contact/template), created.

tools.name: activecampaign_add_tag_to_contact
tools.description: Attach a tag to a contact (creates a contactTag join).

tools.name: activecampaign_remove_tag_from_contact
tools.description: Remove a tag→contact join (NOT delete the tag itself).

contactTagId.description: contactTag ID (NOT the tag ID — get it from contactTags list under the contact).

tools.name: activecampaign_list_deals
tools.description: List CRM deals with optional filters.

tools.name: activecampaign_create_deal
tools.description: Create a CRM deal. Required: title, value (in cents), currency, group (pipeline ID), stage (stage ID), owner (user ID). Contact link via `contact` field.

deal.description: {title, description?, value: cents, currency:'usd', group: PIPELINE_ID, stage: STAGE_ID, owner: USER_ID, contact: CONTACT_ID?, fields?:[{customFieldId, fieldValue}]}. Wrap inside {deal: {...}}.

tools.name: activecampaign_update_deal
tools.description: Update a deal — common: change stage_id (move pipeline), set status=1 (won) or 2 (lost), update value.

deal.description: {title?, value?, stage?, status?, owner?, fields?}. Wrap inside {deal: {...}}.

tools.name: activecampaign_list_pipelines
tools.description: List deal pipelines (each pipeline has multiple stages). Returns id, title, currency, allow_html_descriptions.

tools.name: activecampaign_list_pipeline_stages
tools.description: List stages, optionally filtered to a pipeline. Each stage has id, title, color, width, order, group (pipeline ID).

tools.name: activecampaign_list_custom_fields
tools.description: List custom fields defined on contacts. Returns id, title, type (text/dropdown/date/...), perstag (the merge tag name).
